title: JEChUnofficialEdition
description: JustEnoughCharacters unofficial 1.20.4 NeoForge fork. Universal tweaks to let mods search in Chinese Pinyin.
body:
# JustEnoughCharacters Unofficial Edition

JustEnoughCharacters unofficial NeoForge 1.20.4 port.

A mod allow to use chinese pinyin to search contents on NeoForge 1.20.4.

This fork add NeoForge 1.20.4 support.
